texto: Whether we, admit it or not ,but forgiveness is one of the special attributes and qualities of our creator. we cannot forgive and forget anything, incident or matter ,even if we try hard , still some stale memories keep on hurting like pieces of broken glass or sand particles.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a AISHA RAHEEL: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Whether we, admit it or not ,but forgiveness is one of the special attributes and qualities of ou…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, forgiveness, memories pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de memories.

frase_original: Whether we, admit it or not ,but forgiveness is one of the special attributes and qualities of our creator. we cannot forgive and forget anything, incident or matter ,even if we try hard , still some stale memories keep on hurting like pieces of broken glass or sand particles.

texto: Forgiveness is an attribute we must practice , as we all want the Al-mighty to forgive us. But forgetting and trusting again with a revivifying attitude is undoubtedly stark exhausting . We have a wonderful memory like a nostalgic alarm which hurdles us in bandaging the heart and mind just like a new one.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a AISHA RAHEEL: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “Forgiveness is an attribute we must practice , as we all want the Al-mighty to forgive us. But fo…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, forgetting, memory pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de memory e trusting.

frase_original: Forgiveness is an attribute we must practice , as we all want the Al-mighty to forgive us. But forgetting and trusting again with a revivifying attitude is undoubtedly stark exhausting . We have a wonderful memory like a nostalgic alarm which hurdles us in bandaging the heart and mind just like a new one.
